top_signals.title: Oil Extends Drop as More Tankers Cross Hormuz After Peace Talks
top_signals.summary: Oil extended declines as more tankers openly cross the Strait of Hormuz, while the US and Iran signal progress toward ending the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pimco Sees China’s Export Glut Boosting Emerging-Market Bonds
top_signals.summary: China’s flood of cheap exports is bolstering the case for emerging-market bonds by helping to keep inflation under control across the developing world, according to Pacific Investment Management Co.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Jindalee Lithium inks stewardship MoU for McDermitt project
top_signals.summary: The MoU establishes a framework for HiTech and RESOLVE to explore the creation of a voluntary Stewardship Area in the broader Oregon-Nevada caldera region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google’s online dominance is showing signs of cracking in AI era
top_signals.summary: While Google remains in a position of strength in the eyes of Wall Street, the AI era is complicating the company's story.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
